articles.author: Elaine Kurtenbach
articles.title: Shares mostly gain in Asia after Wall St hits new records, while oil slips - AP News
articles.description: Shares are mixed in Europe and Asia, with big gains for computer chipmakers and other tech stocks. Brent crude oil climbed more than $2 as the U.S. launched an effort early Monday to guide ships out of the Strait of Hormuz. Iran rejected the plan, though U.S.…
articles.content:
Shares were mixed in Europe and Asia on Monday, with big gains for computer chipmakers and other tech stocks after Fridays rally on Wall Street.
